# daytona_organization_member (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona organization member by organization ID and user ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_organization_member" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
  user_id         = "user-id"
}

output "daytona_organization_member_email" {
  value = data.daytona_organization_member.example.email
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.
- `user_id` (String) Daytona user ID of the organization member.

### Read-Only

- `assigned_role_ids` (Set of String) Custom organization role IDs assigned to the member.
- `created_at` (String) Organization membership creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) Member email address.
- `id` (String) Daytona organization member user ID.
- `name` (String) Member display name.
- `role` (String) Organization member role.
- `updated_at` (String) Organization membership update timestamp.
